overview: A mobile-friendly app for truckers to track their current load details and calculate real-time profit per mile on every trip. Keeps a full history of completed trips with sortable records.
features: Active trip dashboard with live profit per mile calculation
Manual entry for cargo, miles, revenue, MPG, and fuel price
Complete trip action that saves to history
Sortable trip history table with all key metrics
Trip detail view for full breakdown of any past trip
Responsive layout optimized for use in a truck cab
